CRM built into Gmail. Manage pipelines,: CRM built into Gmail. Manage pipelines, boxes, tasks, comments, contacts and organizations from your flows.
Your personal Streak API key.\n\n**How t:
Your personal Streak API key.

**How to get your API key:**
1. Open Gmail with the Streak Chrome extension installed.
2. Click the Streak icon in the right sidebar.
3. Click the **Settings** (gear) button, then go to **Integrations**.
4. In the **Streak API** section, click **Create New Key** and copy the key.

Your API key gives full access to your Streak account — keep it secret.
Create a new box (record) in a pipeline.

Fetch a single box with its current stag: Fetch a single box with its current stage, fields, and counts.
Search boxes by name or query. Returns m: Search boxes by name or query. Returns matching boxes across all pipelines, optionally filtered to one pipeline.
Add a new stage (column) to a pipeline.

Add a comment to a box.
Create a contact in a team. If a contact: Create a contact in a team. If a contact with the same email already exists, return that contact instead of creating a duplicate.
Create an organization in a team. If an: Create an organization in a team. If an organization with the same domain already exists, return that organization instead of creating a duplicate.
Get the Streak user associated with the: Get the Streak user associated with the connected API key.
